fields.description: Unique identifier within the flow e.g. 'ask_name', 'confirm_renewal'
fields.label: Node Key

fields.description: Message: bot says + auto-moves on. Question: bot says + waits for reply. Branch: routes on user input via branch_conditions. Action: runs the named linked_action function. Handover: ends session + creates Member Request.
fields.label: Node Type

fields.description: node_key of the next node (linear flow). For Branch nodes, this is the DEFAULT next node if no branch_condition matches.
fields.label: Next Node

fields.description: Python function name to invoke when node_type=Action. Resolved at runtime by gym_management.chatbot.ACTION_REGISTRY (e.g. 'lookup_subscription', 'lookup_class_schedule', 'create_member_request', 'send_template').
fields.label: Linked Action

fields.description: For Question nodes only: name of the session_data key to store the user's reply into (e.g. 'name', 'phone', 'goal'). Leave blank if you don't need to remember the reply.
fields.label: Capture Key

fields.description: What the bot says. May reference session variables with {{var_name}} (e.g. 'Hi {{member_name}}, your sub ends on {{end_date}}'). Required for Message / Question / Handover nodes; optional for Branch / Action.
fields.label: Prompt Text

fields.description: JSON dict mapping reply patterns to next_node_keys. Used by Branch nodes. e.g. {"yes|yeah|confirm": "confirm_yes", "no|nope|cancel": "confirm_no"} — keys are pipe-separated keyword groups (case-insensitive substring match).
fields.label: Branch Conditions
